title: Tau 7 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa - Ministry of Education
content:
## Tau 7 – Te Marautanga o Aotearoa
Understand what your child will have learned by the end of Tau 7 at kura, and ideas on how to support their learning at home.
- Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 0 to 8

We’re inviting whānau to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey
- Pāngarau – Tau 7 Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i te Pāngarau hei te mututanga o te Tau 7 ki te kura. Find out more

### Te Reo Rangatira – Tau 7
Tēnā koutou e te whānau. Nei rā ngā hau o mihi e pupuhi ana! Hei tautāwhi tēnei rauemi i a koutou ki te hāpai i te ako a ā tātou mokopuna i Te Reo Rangatira i ngā Tau 7 ki te kura.
